mapper.insert: insert into tbl_simpleBoard(title, writer, content) values(#{title},#{writer},#{content})
mapper.select: select sbno , sb.title , sb.writer, sb.content,sb.regdate,sb.updatedate ,rsbno,replyNum from tbl_simpleboard sb, (select sbno rsbno,count(nvl(sbno,0)) replyNum from tbl_simpleBoardReply group by sbno) where rsbno(+)=sbno
